news.t: This Top-Performing Small-Cap Manager Is Betting Big on China
Matthews Asia Launches First Active ETF Strategies to Meet Growing Client Need

holdings.infoBox: MEM is an equity ETF with a total of 77 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.31%, Samsung Electronics at 6.72%, CASH AND OTHERS at 5.01%, SK Square at 3.98%, and SK hynix at 3.83%.

overview.description: The Matthews Emerging Markets Equity Active ETF (MEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in emerging market companies with perceived sustainable growth potential. MEM was launched on Jul 13, 2022 and is issued by Matthews.

holdings.n: Samsung Fire & Marine Insurance Co., Ltd.

data.title: This Top-Performing Small-Cap Manager Is Betting Big on China
data.text: The Matthews Emerging Markets Small Companies fund has delivered a 15.1% annualized three-year return, landing it in the top 1% of its peers. Here's what manager Vivek Tanneeru is buying now.

data.title: Matthews Asia Launches First Active ETF Strategies to Meet Growing Client Need
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Matthews Asia launched three active exchange traded funds (ETFs) on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) today that focus on global emerging markets, Asia and China. The ...
